description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a gable roof covered in reddish-brown tiles. The main structure is painted white, and it features a prominent front entryway facing a paved road, with a driveway leading to an attached garage on one side. The property is bordered by a green lawn, and the house is set back from the street by a narrow strip of grass. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, and the garage has a flat roof with a contrasting color. The house is situated adjacent to a two-lane road with a sidewalk, suggesting a typical residential neighborhood setting.
description: A single-story white house with a reddish-brown gable roof, attached garage, and green lawn, set beside a paved road.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, attached garage, and the house facing the road.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the garage, and the road running parallel.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back of the house, lawn, and the garage's side.
description_view_3: Direct rear view displaying the backyard area and the back of the garage.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a small overhang, steps leading up, and a direct path to the sidewalk.
